evals.name: nebula-analytics
evals.prompt: I want to create a design system for my startup called Nebula Analytics. Our primary brand color is #7C3AED (purple), domain is nebula-analytics.com, and our slogan is 'Data insights that matter'. Can you help me generate the complete design system?
evals.expected_output: Should create a complete brand design system in ./brands/nebula-analytics/ including design-tokens.json with purple color palette, design-system.css with CSS variables, components files, and brand identity outline. The design tokens should include the primary purple color and derived semantic colors.

assertions.name: design-tokens.json exists
assertions.check: File ./brands/nebula-analytics/design-tokens.json or similar output location contains valid JSON with color definitions

assertions.name: design-system.css exists
assertions.check: CSS file exists with CSS custom properties (--color-* variables)

assertions.name: Brand name in config
assertions.check: Generated files reference 'Nebula Analytics' brand name

assertions.name: Complete file set
assertions.check: At least 4 key files generated: tokens, CSS, example/demo, and documentation/guideline

evals.name: techflow-quick
evals.prompt: Quick one - generate a design system for TechFlow, blue theme (#0EA5E9), use Inter font, output to ./my-brands/techflow
evals.expected_output: Should detect quick mode, create config with provided details, and generate design system in the custom output path ./my-brands/techflow with blue color scheme and Inter typography. Should include all standard design system files.

assertions.name: Custom output path used
assertions.check: Files were generated in ./my-brands/techflow directory (not default location)

assertions.name: Inter font specified
assertions.check: Config or CSS mentions Inter font family

assertions.name: Quick mode recognized
assertions.check: Process didn't require additional interactive prompts (all info was extracted from one line)

evals.name: greenleaf-nature
evals.prompt: Create a brand design system. Brand name is Greenleaf Wellness, I want a nature-inspired green color (#10B981), domain greenleaf-wellness.com, slogan 'Natural health, naturally', and use the 'nature' color naming style.
evals.expected_output: Should generate design system with nature-themed semantic color names (derived from the 'nature' naming style), green color palette based on #10B981, and all standard design system artifacts in ./brands/greenleaf-wellness/

assertions.name: Nature naming style applied
assertions.check: design-tokens.json uses nature-themed color names (like leaf, forest, moss, sage, etc.) instead of generic names

assertions.name: Green primary color
assertions.check: Primary color #10B981 present in color definitions

assertions.name: Brand slogan included
assertions.check: Brand identity or config files contain the slogan 'Natural health, naturally'

assertions.name: Domain in config
assertions.check: greenleaf-wellness.com domain is mentioned in generated files

assertions.name: Complete design system
assertions.check: All key artifacts present: tokens, CSS, guidelines, and example/demo
